news.summary: Sowell Management (Sowell), a prominent Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) catering to financial advisors and their clients, has announced a collaboration with Goldman Sachs Asset Management and GeoWealth to introduce new products. This partnership, effective from May 15, 2025, will provide diversified investment opportunities to Sowell's Advisors. The endeavor aims to enhance the range of services offered by Sowell Management, thereby benefiting both advisors and clients. This initiative signifies a strategic move towards expanding investment options and enriching the financial offerings available to customers.
news.headline: Sowell Management collaborates with Goldman Sachs to introduce new portfolio strategies for advisors.

news.summary: Royal Philips has released its 10th Future Health Index (FHI) report, indicating a growing strain on global healthcare systems. The report highlights how AI has the potential to transform care delivery but faces trust gaps among clinicians and patients that could slow down adoption. The report reveals that patients in 16 countries are waiting nearly two months or more for specialist appointments, with waits in Canada and Spain extending up to four months or longer. According to the report, 33% of patients have experienced worsening health due to delays in seeing a doctor, with 1 in 4 patients ending up in the hospital due to long wait times. Cardiac patients face dangerous delays, with 31% being hospitalized before seeing a specialist. Additionally, more than 75% of healthcare professionals report losing clinical time due to incomplete or inaccessible patient data, with one-third losing over 45 minutes per shift, equating to 23 full days per year. The report emphasizes the urgency of adopting AI to address these challenges as a shortfall of 11 million health workers is projected by 2030, leaving millions without timely care.
news.headline: Philips FHI 2025 Report finds AI can reduce care delays and data burden in healthcare; 33% patients face delays and 1 in 4 end up hospitalized, showing urgency for AI adoption.

news.summary: In Cupertino, California, on May 15, 2025, Ambow Education Holding Ltd. revealed a new partnership with Colorado State University. Under the agreement, Ambow will provide its HybriU's Digital Educational Solution platform to enhance classroom engagement and improve the phygital learning experience for students and faculty. Ambow, listed on NYSE American as AMBO, is a renowned global EdTech and AI solutions provider. This collaboration aims to bring innovative digital tools to Colorado State University, fostering a more interactive and dynamic learning environment.
news.headline: Colorado State University partners with Ambow for HybriU platform. Elevating phygital learning with AI-powered solutions.Character count: 95

news.summary: The initial participant has been included in a multi-dose Phase 1b/2 study of Bel-sar for Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer (NMIBC). Anticipated findings at the 3-month mark are projected by the conclusion of 2025.
news.headline: Aura Biosciences enrolls first patient in multi-dose trial of Bel-sar for NMIBC. Initial data expected by year-end 2025.

news.summary: Today, T1 Energy Inc. (NYSE: TE) released its financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2025. The report was announced from Austin, Texas, and New York.
news.headline: T1 Energy (NYSE: TE) reports Q1 2025 results; financial and operating details disclosed.

news.summary: Katapult announces that its gross loan originations and revenue have surpassed expectations. The company is pleased to report that its growth is expected to accelerate in the second quarter. This indicates a significant increase in financial performance, highlighting a strong upward trend in both loan issuance and revenue generation. The company is on track to achieve substantial growth in the coming months.
news.headline: Katapult exceeds expectations with 15.4% gross originations and 10.6% revenue growth in Q1, anticipates further growth in Q2.

Operating under the ticker symbol XNET on Nasdaq, Xunlei is based in Shenzhen, China. In this period, the company reported significant financial achievements.
news.headline: Xunlei reports Q1 2025 unaudited financial results; a leading tech company providing cloud services in China.

news.summary: Barnwell Industries, Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company disclosed revenue of $3,569,000 from continuing operations, and incurred a net loss of $1,538,000 or $0.15 per share during this period. In comparison, during the same quarter in the previous year ending on March 31, 2024, the company reported revenue of $4,678,000 from continuing operations, with a net loss of $1,306,000 or $0.13 per share.
news.headline: Barnwell Industries reports $3.6M revenue and $1.5M net loss in Q2 Ended March 31, 2025; $4.7M revenue in Q2 2024.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the main index falling by 5% to 10,000 points. This sharp decline was attributed to concerns about slowing economic growth and ongoing trade tensions. Additionally, experts noted that the unemployment rate rose by 2%, reaching 8%, due to several companies cutting jobs amid the economic uncertainty. On a positive note, the government announced a stimulus package of $50 billion to boost the economy and support industries affected by the current market conditions. Despite these efforts, investors remain cautious as they monitor the situation closely.
news.headline: Gold price peak may have been reached, according to BofA's Blanch.
Explore latest data on Industrials sector & industry performance at Bloomberg for up-to-date insights.

news.summary: A recent report states that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.3% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020. Emerging markets and developing economies are projected to grow by 6.7% this year. However, the recovery remains highly uncertain due to the ongoing pandemic and varying vaccine distribution. It is estimated that global trade volume will witness an 8.4% increase in 2021 after a 5.3% decline last year. Additionally, inflation in advanced economies is forecasted to rise to 1.7% from 0.3% in 2020. The report indicates that policymakers need to focus on containing the pandemic and implementing supportive policies to ensure a sustainable recovery.
news.headline: Investors are ditching S&P 500 hedges amid rally, reversing course.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a significant increase in job opportunities in the technology sector, with over 200,000 new positions added in the past year alone. This growth has been attributed to the increasing demand for roles in software development, data analysis, and cybersecurity. The report also highlights the trend of remote work becoming more commonplace, with a 40% increase in tech companies offering remote positions. In addition, the average salary in the tech industry has seen a 10% rise compared to the previous year, with professionals in high-demand roles commanding even higher pay. This surge in job openings and salaries reflects the ongoing expansion and evolution of the technology industry.
news.headline: India has proposed to eliminate all tariffs on American goods, as indicated by Trump, without citing specific numbers.

news.summary: In London on May 15, 2025, IUX Markets Ltd, a prominent forex broker, was recently awarded the titles of 'Best Risk Management Technology Forex Broker, Asia, 2025' and 'Best Forex Broker for Low Spreads, Asia, 2025' by Global Brands Magazine (GBM) during the Global Brand Awards. The company has made a mark by excelling in risk management technology and offering competitive spreads, solidifying its position in the industry. The recognition from GBM further solidifies IUX Markets' reputation in the forex market, with these accolades highlighting their expertise in Asia.
news.headline: IUX Markets Ltd wins 'Best Risk Management Technology Forex Broker, Asia, 2025' and 'Best Forex Broker for Low Spreads, Asia, 2025' at Global Brand Awards.

news.summary: In London, according to data from Omdia, display panel makers are anticipating a 3% decrease in fab utilization rates in the second quarter of 2025. This decline follows a period of stability that commenced in the middle of the fourth quarter of 2024. The projected reduction is attributed to expected decreases in LCD TV panel orders from leading TV brands. Chinese panel makers are set to reduce orders from May onwards, after accumulating inventory for the mid-year sales promotion on June 18th. Additionally, Korean TV brands are also anticipated to adjust their orders in response to this trend.
news.headline: Omdia predicts a 3% drop in fab utilization rates for display panel makers in Q2 2025 due to weak LCD TV panel demand; Chinese manufacturers to cut orders after 618 promo.

news.summary: Nagarro, a global digital engineering leader, released audited financials for 2024 and unaudited numbers for Q1 2025. In 2024, revenue was €972.0 million, up 6.6% from 2023, with a gross profit of €295.8 million and adjusted EBITDA of €147.5 million. Net profit remained at €49.2 million. There were 186 clients with revenue over €1 million. Operating cash flow was €86.5 million. Cash balance at year-end was €192.6 million. Loans were €329.6 million. The company had 17,695 employees. Q1 2025 saw revenue of €246.9 million, a YoY growth of 3.6%, with a gross profit of €75.5 million and adjusted EBITDA of €30.2 million. Net profit was €11.2 million. Cash balance at the end of Q1 was €162.2 million. The Management Board and the Supervisory Board will propose a dividend of €1 per share to the Annual General Meeting. Nagarro plans to expand the Supervisory Board with new candidates.
news.headline: Nagarro releases audited FY 2024 results - €972.0M revenue. Unaudited Q1 2025 results - €246.9M revenue. Proposed dividend €1/share.

news.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. (NASDAQ: CSCO) is making significant changes in its approach to cybersecurity by integrating security into network infrastructure, aiming to revolutionize enterprise cybersecurity. During its recent third quarter earnings call, Cisco revealed plans to incorporate security features directly into the network itself rather than relying on traditional firewall boxes. The introduction of the new HyperShield system and latest smart network switch signifies a departure from selling standalone firewall devices. This shift allows for the blocking of threats as data travels through the network without the need for additional hardware. This strategic move demonstrates Cisco's commitment to enhancing network security and staying ahead of cybersecurity threats. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cisco Systems Inc. is targeting a security overhaul by embedding security into its network infrastructure, moving away from traditional firewalls. Gain insights on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Ibotta Inc. (NYSE: IBTA) has revealed new insights into changing brand behaviors with a focus on strategies by consumer packaged goods (CPG) companies to succeed in the competitive retail environment. During its latest quarter results announcement, Ibotta's CEO, Bryan Leach, discussed the increasing adoption of Ibotta's CPID model by brands. This model, standing for "cost per incremental dollar," allows companies to manage promotional spend based on measurable ROIs instead of traditional calendar-based campaigns. Leach highlighted a shift in approach by CPG clients, who now consider ongoing cost per incremental dollar targets to determine the longevity of promotions. This departure from past practices signals a transformative change in the industry, moving away from reliance on annual planning. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ibotta CEO reports 8x increase in brand spending as companies shift to ROI-focused strategy in competitive retail market.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures were down after positive momentum in tech stocks led by Nvidia following deals with Saudi Arabia and strong earnings from Cisco Systems and CoreWeave. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is set to headline the annual Computex trade show in Taipei. Investors are evaluating the economic impacts of a tariff pause with China while awaiting Producer Price Index data. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.50% and the two-year bond was at 4.03%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool shows a 91.7% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping current interest rates unchanged in June. Futures were down for major benchmarks: Dow Jones (-0.42%), S&P 500 (-0.81%), Nasdaq 100 (-0.63%), Russell 2000 (-0.35%). SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF also declined in premarket trading. Wednesday saw mixed U.S. stock market performance, with S&P 500 up 4% week-to-date, Dow up 2%, and Nasdaq up over 6% for the week. U.S. mortgage applications saw a modest 1.1% increase.
news.headline: US stock futures expected to open lower after S&P 500's 3-day winning streak. Tech stocks gain, Nvidia and Cisco lead. Fed likely to keep rates unchanged. Futures: Dow -0.42%, S&P 500 -0.81%, Nasdaq 100 -0.63%, Russell 2000 -0.35%. SPY down 0.68% to $583.57, QQQ down 0.87% to $514.18. Sectors mixed, with IT and communication leading gains on Wednesday. FedWatch tool projects 91.7% likelihood of unchanged rates in June.

news.summary: Ukraine is considering adopting Bitcoin as a national reserve asset to enhance financial resilience amidst the ongoing war with Russia. A draft bill for a Bitcoin national reserve proposal is in its final stages, per Yaroslav Zhelezniak, a parliament member. The movement towards a Bitcoin reserve follows similar actions in the US and Sweden for Bitcoin adoption. However, legal challenges could slow down the adoption process, according to Kyrylo Khomiakov from Binance. This initiative may also lead to greater regulatory clarity in Ukraine. The country was planning to legalize cryptocurrencies in coordination with the NBU and IMF in early 2025. Not all in Ukraine's crypto industry are optimistic about the proposal, given the country's economic challenges and social issues.
news.headline: Ukraine nears final stages of approving Bitcoin reserve bill, potentially using BTC as a national asset amid war with Russia.
In 2025, all resolutions were adopted at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has hit a record high, reaching 190 million people. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in this increase, impacting various industries across the world and leading to mass layoffs. Additionally, over 1.6 billion workers in the informal economy are at risk of losing their livelihoods due to the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. The situation is particularly dire in developing countries, where 60% of workers are employed informally and lack social protection. This alarming trend highlights the urgent need for governments and organizations to implement measures to support those affected by unemployment and prevent further economic instability.
news.headline: Investors drop S&P 500 hedges amid rally shift.
